entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum [L.] R. Br, the target crop of the study

entities.name: HETEROTIC GROUPS
entities.description: Groups of genotypes with unique genetic backgrounds used in hybrid breeding

entities.name: HGB
entities.description: Heterotic Group B, one of the two major heterotic groups in pearl millet

entities.name: HGR
entities.description: Heterotic Group R, one of the two major heterotic groups in pearl millet

entities.name: HYBRID BREEDING PROGRAMMES
entities.description: Programs aimed at enhancing crop potential through hybrid combinations

entities.name: TESTERS
entities.description: Inbred lines used to determine the combining ability of new breeding lines

entities.name: COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: The capacity of a parental line to produce superior offspring in hybrid combinations

entities.name: LINE X TESTER MATING DESIGN
entities.description: A breeding design used to produce test crosses between lines and testers

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The region where the test crosses were evaluated

entities.name: RANK CORRELATION ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to evaluate tester effectiveness based on line performance

entities.name: DISCRIMINATION ABILITY
entities.description: The ability of a tester to differentiate between the performance of different breeding lines

entities.name: GENERAL COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: The average performance of a genotype in a series of hybrid combinations

entities.name: PER SE PERFORMANCE
entities.description: The individual performance of a genotype

entities.name: BIPLOT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A graphical method used to visualize and analyze the relationship between genotypes and traits

entities.name: HGB1-T3
entities.description: An efficient tester identified within the HGB group

entities.name: HGB2-T3
entities.description: An efficient tester identified within the HGB group

entities.name: HGR1-T1
entities.description: An efficient tester identified within the HGR group

entities.name: HGR2-T1
entities.description: An efficient tester identified within the HGR group

entities.name: GENETIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: The overall process of analyzing genetic data to identify efficient testers
